title: Having Different data in a top level group
excerpt: We have a scenario where we want a top level group to show headline project information and the groups below to show the task information.  Can there be a new feature that allows groups on the boar to show different data…

posts.author: GeorginaMonet1 (Georgina Monet)
posts.cookedHtml: We have a scenario where we want a top level group to show headline project information and the groups below to show the task information. Can there be a new feature that allows groups on the boar to show different data which is setup as a view of the main table?

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@GeorginaMonet1

This is an existing request: Different columns in different groups within one board - Feature requests - monday Community Forum

I recommend putting your vote in there.

Jim - The Monday Man
